ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Full name of the gene */,
  "gene_biotype" TEXT /* Type of gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the gene (e.g., +, -) */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene's function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene where the mutation occurs */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of mutation (e.g., frame-shift deletion, missense mutation) */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the mutation */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect of the mutation (e.g., loss-of-function, gain-of-function) */,
  "mutation_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the mutation */,
  "mutation_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the mutation in the population */,
  "mutation_consequence" TEXT /* Consequence of the mutation (e.g., pathogenic, benign) */,
  "mutation_source" TEXT /* Source of the mutation data (e.g., database, experiment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expressions" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene expression */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being expressed */,
  "tissue" TEXT /* Tissue where the gene is expressed */,
  "cell_line" TEXT /* Cell line used for expression analysis */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Level of gene expression */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment where the expression was measured */,
  "expression_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the expression (e.g., RNA-seq, qPCR) */,
  "expression_condition" TEXT /* Condition under which the expression was measured (e.g., normal, disease) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expressions_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomal_data" (
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Name of the chromosome */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the chromosome */,
  "hic_compartment" TEXT /* Hi-C compartment of the chromosome */,
  "local_gene_density" REAL /* Local gene density of the chromosome */,
  "chromosome_build" TEXT /* Build version of the chromosome (e.g., GRCh38) */,
  "chromosome_band" TEXT /* Band of the chromosome (e.g., p12, q21) */,
  "chromosome_description" TEXT /* Description of the chromosome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chromosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being accessed */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expression_values" (
  "expression_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression value */,
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expression being measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the expression */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the expression value */,
  "replicate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the replicate for the expression value */,
  "expression_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the expression value (e.g., TPM, FPKM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_values_expression_id FOREIGN KEY ("expression_id") REFERENCES gene_expressions ("expression_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_rates" (
  "mutation_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation rate */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation being measured */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate of the mutation */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the mutation rate */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used to calculate the mutation rate */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study where the mutation rate was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutation_rates_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomal_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome where the feature is located */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., gene, repeat) */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the feature */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_source" TEXT /* Source of the feature data (e.g., database, experiment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hic_compartments" (
  "compartment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compartment */,
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chromosome where the compartment is located */,
  "compartment" TEXT /* Type of compartment (e.g., A, B) */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the compartment */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the compartment */,
  "compartment_description" TEXT /* Description of the compartment */,
  "compartment_source" TEXT /* Source of the compartment data (e.g., database, experiment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compartment_id")
)
